// AUTO-GENERATED by kyo-ffi-codegen v1. DO NOT EDIT.
// Regenerate via `sbt compile` after modifying the binding trait.

package kyo.example

import scala.scalanative.unsafe.*
import scala.scalanative.libc.errno.errno
import scala.scalanative.reflect.annotation.EnableReflectiveInstantiation
import kyo.ffi.*
import kyo.ffi.internal.{AbiCheck, NativePtr, StructAbiCheck}

@EnableReflectiveInstantiation final class ArrayBindingsImpl extends ArrayBindings:
    import `ArrayBindings$externs` as ext

    def sum(xs: Array[Int], n: Int)(using kyo.AllowUnsafe): Int =
        Zone.acquire { implicit z =>
            val xsPtr = alloc[CInt](xs.length)
            var xsI = 0
            while xsI < xs.length do
                (xsPtr + xsI.toLong)(0) = xs(xsI)
                xsI += 1
            val retVal = ext.sum_ints(xsPtr, n)
            retVal
        }
end ArrayBindingsImpl

object ArrayBindingsImpl:
    import scala.scalanative.unsafe.*
    AbiCheck.verify(1, "kyo.example.ArrayBindings")
end ArrayBindingsImpl

@extern
@link("kyo_arr")
private[example] object `ArrayBindings$externs`:
    def sum_ints(xs: Ptr[CInt], n: CInt): CInt = extern
end `ArrayBindings$externs`
